caseId.description: The Case's global `case_id` — the stitch key (ADR-0011).

events.description: The ordered flow **event history** the record is stitched from (doc 04 §5.1).

outcome.description: The Case's final outcome — the terminal blackboard (variable name → value).

orphans.description: Events that did **not** stitch into the chain (doc 13 §2.g). A complete chain has none.

chainComplete.description: True iff the causal chain stitches end-to-end with no orphan (the completeness verdict).

description:
The assembled DecisionRecord for one Case — the stitched causal chain plus the orphan verdict that
proves its completeness (doc 13 §2.g: `orphans: [...]`, chain complete iff empty).
